messages.ticket.embed.admit.desc:
You admitted to combat logging. Same consequences as denial apply:
• You WILL be killed on next login
• Your items are in a player head at logout location
• Opponents can access for 30 minutes
• After 30 min, everyone can access

Thank you for your honesty.
